title: hieracium murorum subsp. subalbovittatum
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. subalbovittatum, also known as a lesser hawkbit or a type of hawkweed, is a plant species belonging to the sunflower family. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Hieracium murorum subsp. subalbovittatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal treatment.
